sentences.en: By withholding moral adjectives, the essay lets machinery of cause and consequence do the judging; readers supply verdicts because no narrator stands at the door handing them a labeled villain.
sentences.zh: 文章刻意少用道德形容词，把褒贬留给因果链条自己去发声；读者自带判决书进来，因为叙事者并不在门口递上一枚现成的恶人标签。

sentences.en: That restraint can sound fair to one audience and evasive to another, which is precisely why newspapers die when everyone insists the tone alone must settle whose side history chose.
sentences.zh: 这种克制在一群人耳中是公允，在另一群人耳中却是闪躲——正因如此，当人人都指望语调代替史实表态时，报纸这类体裁才会陷入信誉衰竭。
